## [15:13 - 16:07]

Um, these are really important. And you know, we've looked at long form direct response copy. FATQs can increase conversions by seven to 15% because people will skim through a page and they'll miss something and then they'll kind of want to order, but they'll have some question that you answered, but they didn't see it. We just assume people read our words or watch our videos all the way through. And they don't, right? They skim, they skip all that kind of stuff. And so FATQs are sort of a way to answer common questions that people will need to have answered before they make a decision to buy and move forward. So that's what, uh, that's what FATQs are all about. And that's it for the checkout pages. It's always, of course, come connect with me on social.
